spec_match.rationale: Three recommended author recipes covers migration paths.

interactive.rationale: Only 1 interactive marker - effectively a static card. Invariant 7 violation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page lists recipes but visitor can't switch between them live.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show which recipe scales to deeply-nested layouts.

openQuestions.title: Add recipe selector
openQuestions.detail: Three radio buttons that switch the visible article between recipes so visitor sees rendered result.

openQuestions.title: Compare with original UA cascade
openQuestions.detail: Add a fourth option that re-applies the old UA rule via author CSS.

summary: Good migration content but ships static. Wire recipes to a live toggle.
